condition: Chronic homonymous visual field defects after acquired brain injury
intervention: Anodal or sham tDCS plus audiovisual training
evidence_role: Best exact-match tDCS plus audiovisual clinical trial lead
protocol_impact: Clinician-supervised adjunct candidate only; do not add home tDCS before behavioral baseline and plateau
next_check: Check for posted registry results or replication

evidence_role: Closest Wake Forest adult chronic AV training registry line
protocol_impact: Supports current AV core; sample/results still small and high-variance
next_check: Monitor for full results publication and protocol/SAP updates

protocol_impact: Watch only; no immediate protocol change
next_check: Check recruitment status and protocol details

evidence_role: Best active AV+tDCS trial lead, but subacute not chronic
protocol_impact: Watch as future evidence; not directly applicable to Eric's chronic window

condition: Subacute homonymous visual field defects after PCA stroke
intervention: tDCS plus vision restoration training versus standard rehab
evidence_role: Subacute VRT+tDCS feasibility and safety pilot
protocol_impact: Park as early-window adjunct evidence; not a chronic home protocol
next_check: Check whether later randomized follow-up has published

evidence_role: Modern blind-field training comparator with posted PMD results
protocol_impact: Supports measurement-first visual training; not audiovisual and long dose

evidence_role: VR audiovisual/cross-modal comparator with posted outcomes
protocol_impact: Supports Quest/cross-modal direction; needs careful effect-size review
next_check: Extract outcome table before citing quantitatively

condition: Visual field defects after cortical damage
intervention: tRNS plus computer or VR visual training
protocol_impact: Watch only; tRNS is not tDCS and is not part of NegletFix

evidence_role: Timing/plasticity study relevant to chronic-vs-subacute expectations
protocol_impact: Watch for results to refine dose/timing expectations
